steps.title: Interpret 0.33x
steps.content: The expression $0.33x$ means $\frac{33}{100} \cdot x$, or 33% of the original value. This is the value after the decrease.

steps.title: Find the percent decrease
steps.content:
If 33% of the original remains after the decrease, then the original was reduced by:
$$100\% - 33\% = 67\%$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
